title: Kinda Modern Beta
description: Make Modern Beta feel a lot more beta.
body:
![Kinda Modern Beta banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d7cd6811330f77871727d7ca03a69368ef4295c.png)

Kinda Modern Beta is a modpack for the [Modern Beta](https://modernbeta.org/) server, aiming to make the server feel less modern and more beta, while providing a few tweaks and QOL features along the way.

## Features
- Pre-configured Nostalgia Tweaks for everything beta, whether it's lighting, menus, or anything else
- A custom beta-esque main menu with a button to log straight into the server
- Tons of optimization, letting everyone experience Modern Beta!
- Custom capes look just like normal ones
- Includes Server Pack Unlocker, allowing the use of custom resource packs
- Everything required for the official server pack to work as intended, including the beta sky & stars and boats without minecarts in them
- Numbered ping, like the server used to have :)
- Autowalk pre-installed to get you to the farlands
- Litematica pre-installed
- Every proxy pre-loaded into the server list for easy access
- Built in zoom mod, configured to resemble OptiFine's famous zoom

And a whole bunch of other little stuff! If you have issues or just want to discuss the pack, it has a dedicated forum post in the Modern Beta Discord, linked on this page's sidebar.


Big thanks to:
- The staff and community of [Modern Beta](https://modernbeta.org/) for being so awesome
- wwu for making [Modern Beta Patches](github.com/collin-b1/ModernBetaPatches)
- [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop), on which the earlier versions (1.x.x) of this pack was based on
